_meta.description: Jurisdiction registry — regulators, authoritative domains, and company registries per jurisdiction. Loaded by config.py at startup.

UAE.label: United Arab Emirates
UAE.notes: DFSA governs DIFC; ADGM/FSRA govern ADGM. CBUAE governs onshore licensed entities.

Saudi Arabia.label: Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
Saudi Arabia.notes: SAMA governs banking and insurance. CMA governs capital markets.

India.label: Republic of India
India.notes: PMLA 2002 is the primary AML framework. DPDP Act 2023 governs data protection.

United Kingdom.label: United Kingdom
United Kingdom.notes: Post-Brexit UK has its own sanctions regime (OFSI) separate from EU.

United States.label: United States of America
United States.notes: BSA/AML is primary framework. CTA 2024 adds UBO reporting via FinCEN.

European Union.label: European Union
European Union.notes: AMLD6 is current AML directive. AMLA becomes supervisor from 2025.

Bahrain.label: Kingdom of Bahrain
Bahrain.notes: CBB is the unified financial regulator.

Qatar.label: State of Qatar
Qatar.notes: QFCRA governs QFC-registered entities. QCB governs onshore.
